creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Install the latest version of the misc/zoneinfo port and then run tzsetup 
to update /etc/localtime.  Alterntivly upgrade to 4-STABLE or a supported 
release. 

Note that the PR system is not the correct place for support questions. 
The freebsd-questions mailing list would be a better choice in the 
future.
